final_prompt.prompt:
Create a WeChat Official Account article cover for the fragrance launch "染秋", in the quiet reverence of autumn's fleeting warmth.

Style/medium: premium editorial cover design with the matte paper stillness of a luxury fragrance lookbook, designed to hold the viewer's breath
Composition: centered composition with generous breathing room, the title as a single anchored weight in the frame
Subject: the Chinese characters "染秋" as the visual anchor, with the tagline "秋意染染 时光留香" as a gentle echo beneath
Scene/backdrop: abstract autumn atmosphere — perhaps a whisper of amber light or a soft gradient suggesting falling leaves, never literal
Lighting/mood: the golden hour hush of late autumn, warm and contemplative, as if the light itself carries scent
Color palette: warm amber and burnt sienna in conversation with muted cream, the chromatic temperature of memory and dried leaves
Materials/textures: matte paper surface with the subtle grain of fine stationery, a tactile invitation to pause
Text (verbatim): 染秋 - 秋意染染 时光留香
Constraints: title must dominate the frame, all Chinese characters rendered with typographic care, 900x500 aspect ratio
Avoid: literal leaf photography, cluttered decorative elements, harsh gradients, generic stock autumn aesthetic
